title: dryopteris setigera var. pallida
intro: Dryopteris setigera var. pallida, also known as the pale stiff-leaved male fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris setigera fern species. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris setigera var. pallida include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Dryopteris setigera var. pallida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
